SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface These<A,B>

All Superinterfaces:
Higher<Higher<These.µ,A>,B>
All Known Implementing Classes:
These.Both, These.That, These.This
public sealed interface These<A,B> extends Higher<Higher<These.µ,A>,B> permits These.This<A,B>, These.That<A,B>, These.Both<A,B>
Represents values that can be either A, B, or Both A and B.
